task_yaml.task:
I've got a small JSON catalog sitting at

    /tmp_workspace/clawbench/sources/data.json

Each entry has a sku, name, price, and stock. Can you find the single
most expensive item in the catalog and write just its sku code
(nothing else needed; a trailing newline is fine either way) to:

    /tmp_workspace/results/answer.txt

Feel free to use whatever tooling is already available on this
machine. A quick check of what's on PATH would be a reasonable place
to start.
